title: petrorhagia illyrica subsp. angustifolia
intro: Petrorhagia illyrica subsp. angustifolia, also known as narrow-leaved rockrose or white rose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of Petrorhagia illyrica subsp. angustifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to fully understand its therapeutic potential.
